name: Alfredo Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 2 Tbsp. evaporated skim milk and place the rest in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Combine the reserved milk with the cornstarch in the saucepan.
3. Cook, stirring until the sauce has thickened.
4. Stir in butter substitute, parmesian cheese, and white pepper.
